records.question: Which genres have a rating of 8, are most popular in Bangladesh, and include songs rated at least 10 from artists based in India where the songs are also from India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN artist ON genre.g_name = artist.preferred_genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE song.rating >= 10 AND genre.rating = '8' AND artist.country = 'India' AND song.country = 'India' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'Bangladesh'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is INNER JOIN artist AS T3 ON T2.artist_name = T3.artist_name WHERE T1.rating = '8' AND T1.most_popular_in = 'Bangladesh' AND T2.rating >= 10 AND T3.country = 'India' AND T2.country = 'India'

records.question: Which genres with a rating of 7 that are most popular in Canada include an English song called My love from the USA, released on 24-JAN-2007, rated 6, with a resolution of at most 1080?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE genre.rating = '7' AND song.song_name = 'My love' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'Canada' AND song.rating = 6 AND song.country = 'USA' AND song.resolution <= 1080 AND song.languages = 'english' AND song.releasedate = '24-JAN-2007'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is WHERE T1.rating = '7' AND T1.most_popular_in = 'Canada' AND T2.song_name = 'My love from the USA' AND T2.languages = 'English' AND T2.releasedate = '2007-01-24' AND T2.rating = 6 AND T2.resolution <= 1080

records.question: Which genres rated 7 that are most popular in Canada include songs named My love released on 24-JAN-2007 in the USA with a rating of at least 6, performed by artists from the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN artist ON genre.g_name = artist.preferred_genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE genre.most_popular_in = 'Canada' AND song.song_name = 'My love' AND artist.country = 'USA' AND genre.rating = '7' AND song.rating >= 6 AND song.releasedate = '24-JAN-2007' AND song.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is INNER JOIN artist AS T3 ON T2.artist_name = T3.artist_name WHERE T1.rating = '7' AND T1.most_popular_in = 'Canada' AND T2.song_name = 'My love' AND T2.releasedate = '2007-01-24' AND T2.country = 'USA' AND T2.rating >= 6 AND T3.country = 'USA'

records.question: Which genres have songs that are exactly 4:30 long?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
JOIN files ON song.f_id = files.f_id
WHERE files.duration = '4:30'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is INNER JOIN files AS T3 ON T2.f_id = T3.f_id WHERE T3.duration = '4:30'

records.question: Which genres have songs with a rating of at least 10 that were released exactly on 27-MAR-2004 by female artists from India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
JOIN artist ON song.artist_name = artist.artist_name
WHERE song.rating >= 10 AND artist.gender = 'Female' AND song.releasedate = '27-MAR-2004' AND artist.country = 'India'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is INNER JOIN artist AS T3 ON T2.artist_name = T3.artist_name WHERE T2.rating >= 10 AND T2.releasedate = '2004-03-27' AND T3.gender = 'Female' AND T3.country = 'India'

records.question: Which genres with a rating of 9 that are most popular in America include English songs from the UK named Just beat it with a duration of 4:34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
JOIN files ON song.f_id = files.f_id
WHERE song.song_name = 'Just beat it' AND files.duration = '4:34' AND song.languages = 'english' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'America' AND song.country = 'UK' AND genre.rating = '9'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is INNER JOIN files AS T3 ON T2.f_id = T3.f_id WHERE T1.rating = '9' AND T1.most_popular_in = 'America' AND T2.languages = 'English' AND T2.country = 'UK' AND T2.song_name = 'Just beat it' AND T3.duration = '4:34'

records.question: Which genres with a rating of 9 include the song exactly named Ami opar hoye?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN artist ON genre.g_name = artist.preferred_genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE song.song_name = 'Ami opar hoye' AND genre.rating = '9'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.g_name FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.g_name = T2.genre_is WHERE T1.rating = '9' AND T2.song_name = 'Ami opar hoye'
